headline: Is Duke Energy (DUK) Pricing Reflect Long Term Grid Investment Plans At US$128.60?
summary: If you are wondering whether Duke Energy is offering fair value at around US$128.60 per share, you are not alone. This article is built to help you frame that question clearly. The stock most recently closed at US$128.60, with returns of 1.0% over the past week, a 1.8% decline over the last 30 days, and 9.5% over both the year to date and the past 12 months. This is set against longer term returns of 45.5% over 3 years and 54.8% over 5 years. Recent headlines around Duke Energy have focused...
